faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

q1.a: We accept Pix (BRL) via SyncPay and international cards (USD) via Stripe. All processing happens through the official gateways, fully encrypted.

q2.a: Each article consumes credits. The free plan includes 10 credits per month. Paid plans include 150 credits (Pro) or unlimited credits (Premium).

q3.a: We use state-of-the-art generative models with optimized prompts and an originality layer. Every article is unique and verified.

q4.q: Do you integrate with Google Search Console?
q4.a: Yes. Connect your Google account and BlogAI Pro shows real-time metrics: clicks, impressions, CTR and average position per URL.

q5.q: How does the Blogger integration work?
q5.a: Authorize through the official Google OAuth flow and publish in one click. We support drafts, scheduling, images and native HTML formatting.

q6.a: Yes. All checkout runs inside Stripe (PCI DSS Level 1). We never store card data on our servers.

q7.a: BRL payments are processed through SyncPay with a Pix QR Code. Credits unlock automatically as soon as payment is confirmed.

q8.q: How do you protect my data?
q8.a: Row-Level Security on the database, TLS 1.3 in transit, JWT tokens, granular per-user policies and full auditing. Aligned with LGPD and GDPR.

q9.a: Yes. No lock-in — cancel in one click and keep access until the end of the paid cycle. No fees, no bureaucracy.

q10.a: Free (10 credits/month), Pro (150 credits + publishing + priority support) and Premium (unlimited credits + scheduling + monetization).

q11.a: Yes. REST API v1 documented in OpenAPI 3.1, with API Key authentication, per-plan rate limits and idempotency support.

q12.a: Yes. On top of Blogger, we ship an official WordPress plugin that publishes in one click straight from your dashboard.

q13.a: Yes. BlogAI Pro has a native Android app (Capacitor) that embeds the full platform for a mobile-first experience.

q14.q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
q14.a: You can export your articles anytime. After cancellation, your data remains available for 30 days before removal, in line with LGPD/GDPR.

q15.a: Email support within 24h for every plan. Pro and Premium customers get priority handling; Premium includes a dedicated account manager.
